text: Every day, I follow a consistent routine that helps me stay productive and healthy. I wake up at six in the morning, drink a glass of water, and do a short meditation before breakfast. By seven thirty, I start my work from home, handling emails and meetings until noon. After lunch, I take a thirty-minute walk or do some yoga to stay active. In the evening, I enjoy cooking dinner, reading a book, or watching a movie. I usually go to bed by ten. This daily pattern keeps me focused and relaxed.
